arts.ttl: Leeds urged to sign “really, really good player” from Serie A giants
arts.sum: Leeds United have been linked with a move for the former Premier League striker Tammy Abraham. The 27-year-old is currently on loan at Italian club AC Milan from Roma. After an impressive start to life in Italian football, Abraham has struggled to hit top form and he has been linked with a permanent exit from […] The post Leeds urged to sign “really, really good player” from Serie A giants appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leeds: 2 knock-on effects of 49ers buying Rangers
arts.sum: Leeds United’s majority stakeholders The 49ers Enterprises are exploring a new venture in the UK, in advanced negotiations for a takeover at Rangers. Barring any switches in the current Elland Road boardroom, this would see Leeds become the latest English club enter the realm of multi-club ownership.

arts.ttl: Sheff Utd v Leeds: Sky commentator makes prediction
arts.sum: Sheffield United host Leeds United on Monday evening with both sides eager to strengthen their position in the top two with a win. Sky Sports’ Gary Weaver previews Sheffield United v Leeds United

arts.ttl: Georginio Rutter trolls Southampton with brilliant celebration Leeds United fans will love
arts.sum: Former Leeds United star Georginio Rutter clearly hasn't forgotten about last years Championship play-off final loss to Southampton . In Brighton's 4-0 thrashing over Southampton on Saturday, Rutter bagged his fifth goal of the season in the Premier League and the Seagull's second goal of the afternoon.

arts.ttl: Leeds United, Sheffield United combined XI
arts.sum: Leeds United travel to Bramall Lane tomorrow night looking to assert their dominance in the Championship title race with another victory, after seeing off Sunderland last time out. Up next is Sheffield United, with both sides boosted in their hunt for a top two finish by both collecting wins last time out, as Burnley and Sunderland dropped points.

arts.ttl: “I’m Expecting Nothing Different” – Sheffield United Boss Previews High Stakes Leeds United Clash
arts.sum: Monday evening will see second-place Sheffield United host top-of-the-league Leeds United under the floodlights at Bramall Lane, in what promises to be one of the best games of the Championship season. With both teams in outstanding form, the stakes couldn’t be higher as Yorkshire rivals clash in a fixture that could have massive implications on […] The post “I’m Expecting Nothing Different” – Sheffield United Boss Previews High Stakes Leeds United Clash appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United title prediction unlikely to sit well with Leeds United boss Daniel Farke
arts.sum: Victory for Daniel Farke's Leeds side will not just take them five points ahead of the Blades in second place, but will once again open up a seven point advantage on third-placed Burnley to put the Whites firmly on course for a Premier League return. Sheffield United are preparing to host Leeds United in a top two Championship battle that is sure to play a key role in the fight for promotion to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Buendia, Hamer and Archer - Four transfer deals Leeds United could revisit this summer - Isaac Johnson - Leeds Live
arts.sum: It looks increasingly likely that Leeds United will be playing Premier League football next season. Daniel Farke has admitted that it is difficult to plan too far ahead when it is unclear what division Leeds will be in next season, and what financial resources will be available.

arts.ttl: 49ers prompted into quick Leeds United action amid PL club pushing to land off-field agreement
arts.sum: Everton’s new owners The Friedkin Group are eyeing Leeds United CEO Angus Kinnear as a new boardroom appointment. Their new owners since September, The Friedkin Group are eyeing Leeds’ Kinnear as a new boardroom appointment to help oversee this major change.

arts.ttl: View: Leeds must consider new Struijk contract soon
arts.sum: Pascal Struijk is finding a very useful habit of coming up with important goals in a Leeds United shirt, and his contributions shouldn’t go unnoticed from a contractual perspective. Leeds moved back to top of the league with their victory over Sunderland on Monday night, teeing up a mouth-watering clash with Sheffield United this coming Monday.
